nodes.label: AI as information retrieval and summarization tool

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer without replacing human role
nodes.grounding_span: I see it has enhancing productivity, but I do not think it can fully take over

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It saves me time for not only trying to search for the document myself

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability in technical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: missing a step can lead to a much bigger issue and possibly a failed update
